item.title: StarTalk: A look at time and motion
item.description: StarTalk explores a thought experiment about moving fast enough to see the universe age differently.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: A look at time and motion
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores a thought experiment about moving fast enough to see the universe age differently.

item.title: StarTalk on chemistry and the search for life
item.description: StarTalk explores why chemistry shapes how we search for life beyond Earth.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk on chemistry and the search for life
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why chemistry shapes how we search for life beyond Earth.

item.title: How Long Will Humans Survive? | StarTalk
item.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson shares his thoughts on how long humans may survive and what that could mean for the future.

media:content.media:title: How Long Will Humans Survive? | StarTalk
media:content.media:description: Neil deGrasse Tyson shares his thoughts on how long humans may survive and what that could mean for the future.

item.title: StarTalk: Too Much Sunlight for Crops?
item.description: StarTalk looks at how too much sunlight can affect crops and what that means for growing conditions.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Too Much Sunlight for Crops?
media:content.media:description: StarTalk looks at how too much sunlight can affect crops and what that means for growing conditions.

item.title: Why life may depend on Earth itself
item.description: StarTalk explores why life may depend not just on biology, but on the planet itself, with astrobiologist Betül Kaçar.

media:content.media:title: Why life may depend on Earth itself
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why life may depend not just on biology, but on the planet itself, with astrobiologist Betül Kaçar.

item.title: Where Would You Land if you Jumped on the Plane?
item.description: StarTalk explores a simple question about what happens if you jump on a plane.

media:content.media:title: Where Would You Land if you Jumped on the Plane?
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores a simple question about what happens if you jump on a plane.

item.title: Life Is About Survival | StarTalk
item.description: StarTalk explores the idea that life is about survival in this short video.

media:content.media:title: Life Is About Survival | StarTalk
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the idea that life is about survival in this short video.

item.title: Why we say a.m. and p.m.
item.description: StarTalk explores why we use a.m. and p.m. instead of saying “12 m.

media:content.media:title: Why we say a.m. and p.m.
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores why we use a.m. and p.m. instead of saying “12 m.

item.title: Landing on the Sun? with StarTalk
item.description: StarTalk explores the question of landing on the Sun in a concise, science-focused look at what makes it impossible.

media:content.media:title: Landing on the Sun? with StarTalk
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the question of landing on the Sun in a concise, science-focused look at what makes it impossible.

item.title: StarTalk explores the question of an afterlife
item.description: StarTalk takes a thoughtful look at the question of whether there is an afterlife.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk explores the question of an afterlife
media:content.media:description: StarTalk takes a thoughtful look at the question of whether there is an afterlife.

item.title: StarTalk: Why stars twinkle
item.description: StarTalk explains why stars appear to twinkle in the night sky.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Why stars twinkle
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explains why stars appear to twinkle in the night sky.

item.title: StarTalk: What if you dug through Earth?
item.description: StarTalk explores a playful science question about what might happen if you could dig a hole through Earth and jump in.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: What if you dug through Earth?
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores a playful science question about what might happen if you could dig a hole through Earth and jump in.

item.title: StarTalk: Is Our Universe Inside a Black Hole?
item.description: StarTalk explores the question of whether our universe could be inside a black hole.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Is Our Universe Inside a Black Hole?
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the question of whether our universe could be inside a black hole.

item.title: The Science of Gardening with StarTalk
item.description: StarTalk explores the science behind gardening in this video.
